_comment: PKHeX-Avalonia UI shell strings. English is the source of truth (issue #132). Do NOT translate PKHeX.Core game data (species/moves/items); those come from GameInfo.Strings. Keys are stable identifiers; only values are translated. Leading underscore in a value marks the menu access-key (mnemonic) and may be dropped or repositioned per language.
Hero_Subtitle: Open a save file to get started
Update_CheckFailedReason: could not reach the update server
Settings_EnableBackups_Desc: Automatically create a backup when saving.
Settings_UpdatePokedex_Desc: Automatically update the Save File's Pokédex when injecting a PKM.
Settings_AdaptPKM_Desc: Automatically adapt PKM info to the Save File (Handler, Format).
Settings_WarnClosingModified_Desc: Warn when closing the editor if changes are unsaved.
Settings_SpriteStyle_Desc: Which Pokémon sprite set to display. 'Use Suggested' matches the loaded save's game (artwork for Scarlet/Violet, mugshots for Legends: Arceus, classic otherwise).
Settings_CheckUpdates_Desc: Query GitHub for a newer release when the app launches. Disabling this makes zero network calls at startup.
Settings_ShowChangelog_Desc: Automatically show the 'What's New' dialog the first time you launch a newer version.
Settings_Theme_Desc: Switches immediately, no restart required. 'Follow System' tracks the OS light/dark preference live.
Settings_Language_Desc: Language for the app's menus and dialogs. Switches immediately, no restart required.
Msg_NoGroupsAvailable: No groups available for this save file.
Msg_CannotDeletePartyPokemon: Cannot delete party Pokémon. Move to a box first.
Msg_FailedToOpenSave_Body:
This save file loaded successfully but the editor could not display it.

LiveHeX_SupportMatrixText:
Sword/Shield — 1.1.1, 1.2.1, 1.3.2
Brilliant Diamond/Shining Pearl — 1.0.0–1.3.0
Legends: Arceus — 1.0.0, 1.0.1, 1.0.2, 1.1.1
Scarlet/Violet — 1.0.1 through 4.0.0

Connection: sys-botbase over Wi-Fi (TCP, default port 6000). USB is not supported in this version.
LiveHeX_WriteConfirmMessage:
This will OVERWRITE Box {0} on the connected console ({1}) with the contents currently shown in PKHeX.

This cannot be undone on the console. Continue?

AccessorEditor_NotSupported: This save file does not support Block Accessor.
ApricornEditor_NotAvailableDesc: This feature is only available for HeartGold/SoulSilver.
AutoLegalityModView_Description: Paste a Pokémon Showdown set. The engine builds a legal Pokémon for the loaded save.
AutoLegalityModView_LoadIntoEditorToolti: Load the generated Pokémon into the main editor (current box slot / party)
BatchEditor_InstructionBuilderDesc: Type a property name and click + Filter (condition) or + Modify (change). Each click adds one line. Run executes all lines together.
BattlePassEditor_NotAvailableDesc: This save type does not support Battle Pass Editor (PBR only).
BerryFieldEditorView_NotSupported: This save file does not support Berry Field editing.
BlockEditor_SearchWatermark: Search by Name, Key or Offset...
BoxLayoutEditor_NotAvailableDesc: This feature is not available for this save type.
BoxReportView_RefreshTooltip: Rebuild the report from the current box contents
BoxReportView_RowTooltip: Double-click a row to jump to that Pokémon in the box viewer
BoxViewer_SeekTooltip: Search this save and seek to matching slots (Ctrl+F)
BoxViewer_FooterHelp: Arrow keys: Navigate | Enter: Select | PageUp/Down: Switch Box | Ctrl+C: View | Ctrl+V: Set | Delete: Clear
Capture7GGEditor_SetAllToCurrentTooltip: Set all species to current captured/transferred values
Capture7GGEditor_SumTotalsTooltip: Calculate totals from individual species counts
ChatterEditor_NotAvailableDetail: This feature is only available for Diamond/Pearl/Platinum/HeartGold/SoulSilver and Black/White/Black 2/White 2.
ChatterEditor_Description: Chatot's Chatter move uses a recorded sound to determine the confusion chance in battle.
ChatterEditor_ImportExportNote: Note: Import/Export of PCM recordings requires file dialogs which can be added if needed.
DaycareEditorView_NotSupported: This save file does not have Daycare support.
DonutEditor_NotAvailableDetail: Donut data is not present in this save. Donuts appear after the feature is unlocked in-game (PLZA only).
DonutEditor_GeneratorDescription: Fill a range of donut slots with random shiny-template donuts using the selected flavor types.
EntitySeekView_Description: Jumps the box view to the next/previous matching Pokémon, across all boxes.
EntitySeekView_BatchWatermark:
One per line, e.g. IVs=31
Move1=33
EntitySeekView_BatchDescription: Batch-editor filter syntax (Property=Value). Combined with the filters above.
EventFlagsEditor_NotAvailableDetail: This save type does not support event flag editing.
EventReset1Editor_Description: Reset overworld Pokémon encounters to allow re-battling them.
EventWorkEditor_NotSupported: This save file does not support Event Work editing.
FashionEditorView_NotSupported: This save file does not support Fashion editing.
FestivalPlazaEditor_NotSupportedDetail: This save type does not support Festival Plaza (Gen 7 SM/USUM only).
Geonet4Editor_NotSupportedDetail: This feature is only available for Diamond/Pearl/Platinum/HeartGold/SoulSilver.
Geonet4Editor_GlobeDescription: The Geonet Globe displays locations you've connected with via GTS/WiFi. Set points to populate your globe with locations.
Geonet4Editor_GlobalFlag: Global Flag (allow globe to pan outside Japan in JP games)
Geonet4Editor_Note: Note: Changes are applied when the save file is saved.
GlobalLink5Editor_NotSupported: This save file does not support Global Link editing. (Gen 5 only)
HallOfFame3EditorView_NotSupported: This save file does not support Hall of Fame viewing. (Gen 3 only)

HallOfFameEditor_SelectEntry: Select an entry to view details
HoneyTreeEditor_NotSupportedDetail: This feature is only available for Diamond/Pearl/Platinum.

JoinAvenueEditor_VisitingPlayerDb: Visiting Player Database (32 remembered TIDs, 0xFFFFFFFF = empty)
LegalityAuditView_RowTooltip: Double-click a row to jump to that Pokémon in the editor
LiveHeXView_Description: Read and write the current box on a hacked console over Wi-Fi (sys-botbase).
LiveHeXView_WriteBoxTooltip: Overwrites the current box on the console (asks for confirmation first)
LiveHeXView_WriteWarning: Writes overwrite the current box on the console and always ask for confirmation first.
LivingDexGeneratorView_Description: Generates one legal Pokémon per species obtainable in this game, then fills boxes starting at the box below.
MedalEditorView_NotSupported: This save file does not support Medal editing. (B2W2 only)
Misc2Editor_GsBallDescription: Enables the GS Ball event, allowing you to obtain Celebi. This feature was originally exclusive to Mobile System GB in Japan but was enabled for Virtual Console releases worldwide.
Misc2Editor_NoSpecialOptions: No special options available for Gold/Silver.
Misc3Editor_MirageIslandAppear: Mirage Island Appear: Match First Party Member
Misc7bEditor_GoParkDescription: Manage Pokémon transferred from Pokémon GO
Misc8bEditor_MythicalDescription: Unlock encounters for mythical Pokémon. Requires appropriate items and conditions.
MysteryGiftDatabaseView_ToggleFiltersToo: Show or hide the filter rail
MysteryGiftEditor_NotAvailableDescriptio: This save type does not support mystery gift storage.
MysteryGiftEditor_RecordsDescription: History of Mystery Gifts received on this save. Switch games deliver gifts directly to your bag or boxes; this list is the in-game gift album.
MysteryGiftEditor_RecordWrongGame: This gift file is for a different game than this save.
MysteryGiftEditor_RecordUnsupportedType: This gift type cannot be converted safely into a save record.
MysteryGiftEditor_RecordInvalidTimestamp: The selected receive date cannot be represented by this game.
MysteryGiftEditor_SerialLockInactive: No serial code lock is active.
OPowerEditor_NotAvailableDescription: This feature is only available for X/Y and Omega Ruby/Alpha Sapphire.

PokemonEditor_SuggestRelearnMovesTooltip: Suggest relearn moves based on species

RTC3Editor_InitialClockDesc: The time when the game was first started.
RTC3Editor_ElapsedClockDesc: The time that has passed since the game was started.
RTC3Editor_BerryGlitchFixTooltip: Set elapsed days to fix the Ruby/Sapphire berry glitch
RTC3Editor_BerryGlitchNote: Note: The Berry Glitch was a bug in Ruby/Sapphire where berries would stop growing after about a year. Setting elapsed days to 2+ years fixes this.
RTCEditor_NotAvailableDesc: This feature is only available for Ruby/Sapphire/Emerald.
RTCEditor_BerryGlitchFixTooltip: Advances elapsed days to fix the berry glitch in Ruby/Sapphire

RaidSevenStar9Editor_NotAvailableDesc: This feature is only available for Pokémon Scarlet/Violet.
RecordsEditorView_NotSupported: This save file does not support Records editing.
RoamerEditor_NotAvailableDesc: This feature is only available for Ruby/Sapphire/Emerald/FireRed/LeafGreen.
SaveDiffView_CompareCurrentVsA: Compare Current Save vs. Backup A
SaveDiffView_CompareAVsB: Compare Backup A vs. Backup B
